_comment: Recorded tool data for offline demo. Each tool reads from here when API_BASE_URL is unset (fixture mode). With a live Toolshop, the tools call the real API instead. Keys are test_ids matching eval/labels.json. These reproduce the 3 marquee scenarios deterministically.

details.name: test_create_product_returns_201
details.stack:
suite/test_products.py:24: in test_create_product_returns_201
    assert resp.status_code == 201
E   assert 500 == 201

violations: required field 'id' missing from response body

service_health.detail: API responds (500 is application-level, not infra)

details.name: test_related_products_eventually_populated
details.message: condition not met within 2s: expected >0 related products, got 0
details.stack:
suite/test_products.py:36: in test_related_products_eventually_populated
    assert len(resp.json()) > 0
E   assert 0 > 0
details.logs: GET /products/1/related -> 200 [] (index lag); seeded by prior test

details.name: test_list_products_returns_200__env_break
details.message: HTTPConnectionPool(host='localhost', port=1): Max retries exceeded: Connection refused
details.stack:
suite/test_products.py:14: in test_list_products_returns_200
    resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/products')
E   requests.exceptions.ConnectionError: Connection refused

service_health.detail: Connection refused at http://localhost:1/api — dependency unreachable

violations: field 'total' type string, schema requires number

details.name: test_search_sort_stable
details.message: expected first result A got B (relevance sort order varies)

details.name: test_orders_count_by_date
details.logs: count depends on timezone date boundary; differs by runner TZ

details.name: test_products_list_redis
details.message: Connection refused: redis cache dependency unavailable

details.name: test_products_list_dns
details.message: Failed to establish a new connection: Name or service not known
details.logs: DNS resolution failed for api host in CI

test_categories_parent_id_is_integer._note: Live demo against the real with-bugs API. With API_BASE_URL set, check_contract hits api-with-bugs.practicesoftwaretesting.com and validates /categories against the live OpenAPI spec. Offline, it replays the recorded violation below.

details.name: test_categories_parent_id_is_integer
details.message: category 'parent_id' is null but OpenAPI contract requires integer

violations: item parent_id is null; schema requires integer (offline fixture; run live for real count)
